message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

box "Frontend" #LightBlue2
  participant NavBar
  participant ReduxStore
  participant UserActions
  participant UserReducer
end box

participant ProfileMiddleware
participant Solid.js
database POD


NavBar ->> ReduxStore : loadEmailRequest()
activate NavBar
ReduxStore->>+UserActions: dispatch(loadEmailRequest()) 
UserActions -->-ProfileMiddleware:loadEmailRequest()  
deactivate UserActions 

group alt [email successfully loaded]    
    activate ProfileMiddleware   
  	ProfileMiddleware-->+Solid.js:getEmail()     
	Solid.js-->>POD:getEmail()      
	deactivate Solid.js       
     note right of POD:X        
	Pod -x Pod         
        deactivate POD          
      loop for each email in emails           
         profilemiddleware <-solidjs:email            
          solidjsx --xsolidxs:x             
       endloop              
else error at loading mail group else branch execution starts here after condition fails above one so this part will execute now insteadof previous block which had failed due to some reason like network issue etc.. Here we are handling errors properly by showing appropriate message user about what went wrong while fetching his/her mails from server side through api call made using axios library inside our react component named InboxPage where all these things happen behind scenes without users even knowing anything until they see result on their screen once everything gets completed smoothly otherwise not!! So let's continue further steps involved during successful completion scenario first before moving onto failure cases later down below...  

reduxstore <--userreducer updated state info regarding newly received messages list alongwith other relevant details suchas sender name subject line date time stamp attachment status read/unread flag
